heading: High Availability
body:
To ensure private endpoint connections to Atlas can
withstand an availability zone outage, you should deploy
subnets to multiple availability zones in a region.

You don't need to take additional actions to ensure that
Azure (Microsoft Azure) private endpoint connections to Atlas can
withstand an availability zone outage.

You don't need to take additional actions to ensure that
Google Cloud private endpoint connections to Atlas can
withstand an availability zone outage.
